sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; export default function ProductItem({product, onEdit, onDelete}){ return (
{product.image}
#{product.id}
{product.product_name}
{product.price}₽
{product.category}
{product.description}
{product.countInStock < 10 ? (
Осталось {product.countInStock} шт.
) : null}
) }
